key_suppliers: Enterprise Navitas Midstream Midland Basin LLC
dependencies: 34 pipeline transportation companies for natural gas delivery

risks: Substantial disruption to or reduction in interstate natural gas pipelines' transmission and storage capacity
Suppliers' inability to deliver contracted commodity
Inability to secure replacement gas quantities
Operational failures or disruptions in pipeline systems
Legislative or regulatory actions affecting pipeline capacity
Hurricanes, tornadoes, floods, extreme cold weather impacts
Terrorist or cyber-attacks on pipeline infrastructure

Potential revision of existing environmental regulations
New environmental regulations on operations

Regulatory lag in traditional ratemaking process
Regulatory review and potential disallowance of costs
Modification or termination of rate mechanisms by regulators

Requirements to adopt new infrastructure or technology to limit emissions

Additional charges to fund energy efficiency activities
Six of eight states passed legislation preventing local governments from limiting energy types
